zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae於1268年出生在英國賀福爾易亞迪斯利時，他的父親Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley52歲，母親Sybil Corbet35歲。他於大約1283年與Sybella Corbett在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1319年在英國英格蘭賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年51歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾金頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae于1268年出生在英国賀福爾易亞迪斯利时，他的父亲Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley52岁，母亲Sybil Corbet35岁。他于大约1283年与Sybella Corbett在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1319年在英国英格兰賀福爾易亞迪斯利享年51岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baskerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Boscherville in Eure, France, named with Old Anglo-Norman French boschet ‘copse, thicket’ (a diminutive of Bois ) + ville ‘settlement, town’.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae was born in 1268, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley, was 52 and his mother, Sybil Corbet, was 35. He married Sybella Corbett about 1283, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1319, in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 51, and was buried in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae est né en 1268, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Sybil Corbet, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Sybella Corbett environ 1283, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1319, à Eardisley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Kington, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae 1268 in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley 52 und seine Mutter Sybil Corbet 35. Er hat um 1283 in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sybella Corbett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1319 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Kington, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae è nato il nel 1268 nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley, aveva 52 anni e il suo madre, Sybil Corbet, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Sybella Corbett circa 1283, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1319, nel Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Kington, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combaeが1268年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで生まれた時，父Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisleyは52歳，母Sybil Corbetは35歳であった。約1283年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードでSybella Corbettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1319年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエアルディスリーで51歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae(이)가 1268년 영국 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley(은)는 52세였고, 그의 어머니 Sybil Corbet(은)는 35세였다. 그는 대략 1283년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 Sybella Corbett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1319년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 에르디슬리에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 킨그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae nasceu em 1268, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Corbet, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybella Corbett aproximadamente 1283, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1319, em Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae родился в 1268 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Sybil Corbet, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybella Corbett около 1283 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1319 г. в местности эардисли, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности кингтон, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley and Lord of Combae nació en 1268, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Baskerville Lord of Eardisley, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Sybil Corbet, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Sybella Corbett aproximadamente 1283, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1319, en Eardisley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Kington, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
